subtitles.original: 「波」ということですね。
subtitles.english: Waves, indeed.

subtitles.original: 実はですね、こちらの八橋蒔絵螺鈿硯箱、
subtitles.english: Actually, this Yatsuhashi Maki-e Raden Inkstone Box...

subtitles.original: 普段展示される際は、箱を閉じた状態なんですよ。
subtitles.english: ...is usually exhibited with its lid closed.

subtitles.original: つまり、中の様子をご覧いただけるのは、
subtitles.english: So, being able to see the inside...

subtitles.original: この配信ならではの貴重な機会です！
subtitles.english: ...is a rare opportunity unique to this stream!

subtitles.original: こちらがなんと！
subtitles.english: And surprisingly,

subtitles.original: 2026年5月26日から8月16日、本館2室にて展示されるとのことで、
subtitles.english: from May 26th to August 16th, 2026, it will be exhibited in Room 2 of the Main Building!

subtitles.original: 東京国立博物館さんで、ぜひ見てみていただければと思います！
subtitles.english: Please go and see it for yourself at the Tokyo National Museum!

subtitles.original: このね、波のね、細かいところがすごく…
subtitles.english: These fine details of the waves are just...

subtitles.original: これ、筆でやってるんですからね。筆でこうやって…
subtitles.english: They painted this with a brush. With a brush, like...

subtitles.original: あ、お時間となってしまいました。
subtitles.english: Ah, it looks like our time is up.

subtitles.original: それでは皆さん、また次回お会いしましょう！
subtitles.english: Well then, everyone, see you next time!

subtitles.original: 特報
subtitles.english: Special Announcement

subtitles.original: 特報 その①
subtitles.english: Special Announcement Part 1

subtitles.original: 儒烏風亭らでん ×
subtitles.english: Juufutei Raden x

subtitles.original: 東京国立博物館
subtitles.english: Tokyo National Museum

subtitles.original: 未来の君に届くように
subtitles.english: May it reach the future you...

subtitles.original: 繋いでいこう この想い
subtitles.english: ...as we pass on these feelings.

subtitles.original: 愛さえあれば大丈夫
subtitles.english: With love, everything will be alright.

subtitles.original: 語り合おう 朝が来るまで
subtitles.english: Let's keep talking until morning comes.

subtitles.original: ということで、なんと！
subtitles.english: So, surprisingly...

subtitles.original: 私、儒烏風亭らでんと…
subtitles.english: I, Juufutei Raden, and...

subtitles.original: 東京国立博物館さんとのコラボが決定しましたー！
subtitles.english: the Tokyo National Museum will be collaborating!

subtitles.original: すごい！
subtitles.english: Amazing!

subtitles.original: みんな、やったよー！
subtitles.english: Everyone, we did it!

subtitles.original: もうね、らでん配信とか、もう色んなところで
subtitles.english: I've been saying on my streams and in various other places...

subtitles.original: 東博さんがね、ずっと大好きだって言ってたんですけれども、
subtitles.english: ...how much I love Tohaku,

subtitles.original: 今回ね、念願の東博らでんコラボでございます！すごい！
subtitles.english: and now, my dream Tohaku-Raden collaboration is finally happening! Amazing!

subtitles.original: あら？「東博」、さっき名前聞きましたね？そうです。
subtitles.english: Oh? 'Tohaku'? You heard that name just a moment ago, right? That's right!

subtitles.original: 先日ね、10月から京都、1月から東京にて開催予定の
subtitles.english: 先日ね、10月から京都、1月から東京にて開催予定の

subtitles.original: 特別展「源氏物語 王朝のかがやき」展の
subtitles.english: Special Exhibition: 'The Tale of Genji: Radiant Culture of the Japanese Imperial Court',

subtitles.original: 音声ガイドのスペシャルトラックを
subtitles.english: I was announced to be in charge of the special track...

subtitles.original: 務めさせていただくことが発表されましたが、
subtitles.english: for the audio guide...

subtitles.original: これね、これチラシね、
subtitles.english: This is the flyer, by the way!

subtitles.original: なんと、この特別展「源氏物語」展の
subtitles.english: And surprisingly, the Tokyo venue for this special 'Tale of Genji' exhibition...

subtitles.original: 東京会場となる東京国立博物館さんとも…
subtitles.english: ...which is the Tokyo National Museum...

subtitles.original: あ、ごめんなさい（笑）
subtitles.english: Ah, sorry! (laughs)

subtitles.original: 東京国立博物館様との…
subtitles.english: With the Tokyo National Museum...

subtitles.original: コラボが決定いたしましたー！すごい！
subtitles.english: our collaboration is officially decided! Awesome!

subtitles.original: 開催時期は、この「源氏物語」展と同じ、
subtitles.english: It is scheduled to run at the same time as 'The Tale of Genji' exhibition...

subtitles.original: 2027年1月に実施予定となっております！
subtitles.english: in January 2027!

subtitles.original: なので、こっちは「源氏物語展 儒烏風亭らでんコラボ」、
subtitles.english: So we have 'The Tale of Genji Exhibition x Juufutei Raden Collaboration',

subtitles.original: そして同じ1月に、東京国立博物館 儒烏風亭らでんコラボがあると。
subtitles.english: and also in January, the 'Tokyo National Museum x Juufutei Raden Collaboration'!

subtitles.original: もっと簡単に言うと、来年の1月は、
subtitles.english: To put it more simply, next January...

subtitles.original: 東博の色んなところにらでんちゃんがね、
subtitles.english: Raden-chan will be appearing...

subtitles.original: 出現しちゃいます！っていう感じです！
subtitles.english: ...all over Tohaku! That's how it is!

subtitles.original: こちら詳細はですね、また続報をお待ちいただければと思います！
subtitles.english: For more details, please look forward to future announcements!

subtitles.original: すごいでしょー！すごい、すごい！
subtitles.english: Isn't that amazing? It's so amazing!

subtitles.original: ということで、本日の重大発表1つ目は、
subtitles.english: So, the first major announcement for today...

subtitles.original: 東博・儒烏風亭らでんコラボでございました！
subtitles.english: ...was the Tohaku x Juufutei Raden collaboration!

subtitles.original: みんなありがとうー！
subtitles.english: Thank you everyone!

subtitles.original: さあ、ライブも重大発表もまだまだ続きます。
subtitles.english: Now, both the live performance and major announcements will continue.

subtitles.original: ちょっと待って、ちょっと疲れちゃった（笑）
subtitles.english: Hold on. I'm a bit tired. (laughs)

subtitles.original: ってことでね、あの、東博…
subtitles.english: So, you know, Tohaku...

subtitles.original: 元々らでんが日本美術史に興味持ったのって、
subtitles.english: The reason I first got interested in Japanese art history...

subtitles.original: 東博さんので、能面を見て、
subtitles.english: ...was because I saw a Noh mask at Tohaku.

subtitles.original: その時に「わぁ、なんて美しいんだ！」って思ったし、
subtitles.english: At that time, I thought, 'Wow, how beautiful!'

subtitles.original: 「らでんって日本で生まれ育ったのに、日本のこと本当に何も知らないんだな」って思ったのがきっかけで、
subtitles.english: and realized, 'I was born and raised in Japan, but I know nothing about it.' That was the trigger.

subtitles.original: そこから、なんやかんやあって、
subtitles.english: From there, through various events...

subtitles.original: 日本美術史勉強したりして、
subtitles.english: I studied Japanese art history...

subtitles.original: なんやかんやあって、ホロライブに入って、
subtitles.english: ...and through more events, I joined Hololive...

subtitles.original: なんやかんやあって、今こんな素敵なお衣装をお披露目して、
subtitles.english: ...and then I got to reveal this wonderful outfit today...

subtitles.original: なんやかんやあって、こんなありがたいコラボを
subtitles.english: and now, thanks to all those twists and turns,

subtitles.original: させていただくことになりました！
subtitles.english: I'm able to do this amazing collaboration!

subtitles.original: みんなのおかげだよ！ありがとうー！
subtitles.english: It's all thanks to everyone! Thank you!

subtitles.original: もう人生本当に何が起こるか分かりません。
subtitles.english: You really never know what will happen in life.

subtitles.original: もうとんでもない。何がどう、
subtitles.english: It's unbelievable. How things...

subtitles.original: 未来へと繋がっていくのか、みたいなことも、
subtitles.english: will connect to the future...

subtitles.original: もう分かりません。人生は奇妙な冒険みたいなもんでございますな。
subtitles.english: ...is completely unpredictable. Life really is like a bizarre adventure.

subtitles.original: さあ、ということでそろそろ次の曲に行きたいと思います。
subtitles.english: All right, so with that, I'd like to move on to the next song.

subtitles.original: それでは聴いてください。
subtitles.english: Please listen...

subtitles.original: 「ココロパズルリズム」
subtitles.english: ...'Kokoro Puzzle Rhythm'.

subtitles.original: はぁーーー
subtitles.english: Ah~~~

subtitles.original: はぁーーー
subtitles.english: Ah~~~

responses.thoughts:
**My Thoughts on the Video Segment (00:00 - 05:03)**

Okay, here's what I've got so far, thinking through this video segment. My aim is to get a really accurate set of subtitles for it.

First, I need to transcribe the spoken parts accurately.

*   **00:00.000 - 00:17.300:** Raden starts by talking about the "Yatsuhashi Maki-e Raden Suzuribako" (Inkstone Box with Eight Bridges, Iris, and Waves). She says seeing the inside is a rare treat since it's usually closed for display.
*   **00:17.300 - 00:31.000:** She announces the inkstone box will be exhibited at the Tokyo National Museum (TNM) from May 26th to August 16th, 2026, and urges viewers to check it out.
*   **00:31.000 - 00:41.200:** Raden highlights the fine brushwork in the wave details of the inkstone box. She seems to be nearing the end of that part, and the next thing I have is a moment of background music before the "Special News" section.
*   **00:41.200 - 00:50.000:** Music plays.
*   **00:50.000 - 01:00.000:** "Special Announcement" slides appear on the screen, showing "Juufutei Raden x Tokyo National Museum"
*   **01:00.000 - 01:15.000:** Then, a song starts. "May it reach the future you..." and "Let's keep talking until morning comes." are the lyrics, a beautiful message. Also, on-screen text about a "2027 January" collaboration between myself and TNM!
*   **01:16.000 - 03:18.000:** Raden excitedly announces the collaboration with the Tokyo National Museum, a dream come true! She expresses her long-time love for the museum and how this partnership is a major achievement, mentioning that this is the first of many such announcements.
*   **03:18.000 - 03:27.500:** A moment of pause. She says she's feeling a little tired.
*   **03:27.500 - 04:07.500:** Raden explains her journey, starting with seeing a Noh mask at TNM, sparking her interest in Japanese art history, leading to this collaboration, thanks to everyone's support. It's a surreal moment for her.
*   **04:07.500 - 04:31.500:** She notes how unpredictable life is and transitions into announcing the next song, "Kokoro Puzzle Rhythm."
*   **04:31.500 - 05:01.500:** The instrumental intro to "Kokoro Puzzle Rhythm" begins, and Raden starts singing with "Ah~~~" at various points.

Okay, that sums it up for this segment. I think those subtitles will be a great start!
